content: save-large-responses.py and log-terminal-output.py registered as PostToolUse hooks in hooks.json. Both read tool_name/tool_input/tool_result from stdin JSON (Claude Code PostToolUse protocol). save-large-responses: matcher Read|Grep|Glob, saves >50 line responses to .context/tool-responses/. log-terminal-output: matcher Bash, saves significant command output to .context/terminal/.
